findings.location: s3 — note at end of section
findings.description: The knowledge file note says `UPDATED_USER_ID（同）` for 更新ユーザID, but the source note explicitly names the column `REGISTER_USER_ID` (「更新ユーザID(REGISTER_USER_ID)」). While the SQL body uses `UPDATED_USER_ID`, the knowledge file's note deviates from the source note text without basis.
findings.source_evidence: Source note: 「更新ユーザID(REGISTER_USER_ID)と更新日付(UPDATE_DATE)も更新対象としている」
